name: AI Insurance Claims Triage & Document Extraction — Demo

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "text": "🚨 *" + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.priority + " CLAIM* — #" + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claim_id + "
*Claimant:* " + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claimant_name + " | *Type:* " + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claim_category + "
*Est. Loss:* " + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.estimated_loss + " | *SLA:* " + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.sla_hours + "h
*Assigned to:* " + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.assigned_specialist_name + " (" + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.assigned_queue + ")
*AI Reasoning:* " + ($('Assign Specialist').item.json.reasoning || '').substring(0, 200) + "
*Red Flags:* " + (($('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.red_flags || []).join(', ') || 'None') }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🚨 [' + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.priority + '] New Claim #' + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claim_id + ' — ' + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claim_category.replace('_',' ').toUpperCase() }}
parameters.message:
=

{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.priority }} Priority Claim

SLA Deadline: {{ new Date(Date.now() + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.sla_hours * 3600000).toLocaleString() }}

Claim ID:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claim_id }}
Policy #:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.policy_number }}
Claimant:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.claimant_name }}
Date of Loss:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.date_of_loss }}
Estimated Loss:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.estimated_loss }}
Location:{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.location }}

AI-Extracted Analysis

Primary Cause: {{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.primary_cause || 'Not determined' }}

Affected Parties: {{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.affected_parties || 'Unknown' }}

Estimated Severity: {{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.estimated_severity || 'Unknown' }}

Coverage Flags:
    {{ ($('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.coverage_flags || []).map(f => '
  • ' + f + '
    • ').join('') || '
  • None identified
    • ' }}
{{ ($('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.red_flags || []).length > 0 ? '
⚠️ Red Flags:
    ' + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields.red_flags.map(f => '
  • ' + f + '
    • ').join('') + '
' : '' }} {{ ($('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields?.missing_info || []).length > 0 ? '
📋 Missing Information:
    ' + $('Assign Specialist').item.json.extracted_fields.missing_info.map(f => '
  • ' + f + '
    • ').join('') + '
' : '' }}

Confidence Score: {{ Math.round(($('Assign Specialist').item.json.confidence || 0) * 100) }}%

{{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.reasoning || 'No reasoning provided.' }}

Assigned to: {{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.assigned_specialist_name }} — {{ $('Assign Specialist').item.json.assigned_queue }}

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Assign Specialist').item.json;

const summary = {
  status: 'processed',
  claim_id: data.claim_id,
  priority: data.priority,
  claim_category: data.claim_category,
  claimant_name: data.claimant_name,
  estimated_loss: data.estimated_loss,
  assigned_to: data.assigned_specialist_name,
  queue: data.assigned_queue,
  sla_hours: data.sla_hours,
  confidence: data.confidence,
  reasoning: data.reasoning,
  red_flags: data.extracted_fields?.red_flags || [],
  processing_timestamp: data.processing_timestamp,
  message: `Claim #${data.claim_id} triaged as ${data.priority}. Assigned to ${data.assigned_specialist_name} (${data.assigned_queue}). SLA: ${data.sla_hours} hours.`
};

return [{ json: summary }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ "text": "📋 *New Claim* — #" + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claim_id + " (" + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.priority + ")
*Claimant:* " + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claimant_name + " | *Type:* " + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claim_category + "
*Est. Loss:* " + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.estimated_loss + "
*Queue:* Standard Processing | *SLA:* " + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.sla_hours + "h
*Summary:* " + ($('Parse Triage Result').item.json.reasoning || '').substring(0, 150) }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Claim #' + $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claim_id + ' — Received & In Review' }}
parameters.message:
=

Claim Received

Dear {{ $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claimant_name }},

{{ $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claimant_message }}

Claim Reference: {{ $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.claim_id }}

Date of Loss: {{ $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.date_of_loss }}

Expected Response: Within {{ $('Parse Triage Result').item.json.sla_hours }} hours

Please keep this reference number for your records. You can reply to this email if you have additional information to provide.

Sincerely,
Claims Processing Team

This is an automated message. Please do not reply directly to this email.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Parse Triage Result').item.json;

const summary = {
  status: 'processed',
  claim_id: data.claim_id,
  priority: data.priority,
  claim_category: data.claim_category,
  claimant_name: data.claimant_name,
  estimated_loss: data.estimated_loss,
  assigned_to: 'Standard Queue',
  queue: 'Standard Processing',
  sla_hours: data.sla_hours,
  confidence: data.confidence,
  reasoning: data.reasoning,
  red_flags: data.extracted_fields?.red_flags || [],
  processing_timestamp: data.processing_timestamp,
  message: `Claim #${data.claim_id} triaged as ${data.priority}. Queued for standard processing. SLA: ${data.sla_hours} hours.`
};

return [{ json: summary }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ "text": "❌ *Claims Workflow Error*\n" + $('Log Error Details').item.json.error_message + "\n*Timestamp:* " + $('Log Error Details').item.json.timestamp }) }}
